query: SELECT rw.id, rw.stage, rw.name, rw.isActive, COUNT(rwe.id) as email_count FROM recruitment_workflows rw LEFT JOIN recruitment_workflow_emails rwe ON rwe.workflowId = rw.id GROUP BY rw.id, rw.stage, rw.name, rw.isActive ORDER BY rw.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SELECT rw.id, rw.stage, rw.name, rw.isActive, COUNT(rwe.id) as email_count FROM recruitment_workflows rw LEFT JOIN recruitment_workflow_emails rwe ON rwe.workflowId = rw.id GROUP BY rw.id, rw.stage, rw.name, rw.isActive ORDER BY rw.id;
